title: Sites Default Files File 2023 09 Pet 20Rent 20Policy 20 281 29 0
content:
PET RENT POLICY
POLICY STATEMENT
DND has always regarded pet fees as impermissible.
POLICY
If an owner or property management company charges monthly pet rent for any
City monitored income-restricted unit, the combined rent cannot exceed the
maximum allowable rent as identified in the Affordable Housing Restrictions (AHR)
or Affordable Rental Housing Agreement and Restrictions (ARHAR).
For example, currently a 1-bedroom unit affordable to households earning up to 70%
of Area Median Income has a maximum allowable rent of $1,318. If the property
charges a pet rent of $100, under this policy, the property can only collect $1,218 for
traditional rent, for a total rent of $1,318.
Approved by DND Policy Committee March 18, 2021
Agreed to by Sheila Dillon, Chief of Housing and Director, Department of
Neighborhood Development
Signature:
Date: April 5, 2021
